saved_test.name: Imperatives — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for imperative sentences: affirmative and negative commands, polite forms, let's suggestions, emphatic do, question tags, passive imperatives, formal and literary imperatives across A1–C2.
